Event: Dragon Hustle
Event Date: 01/02/2021
Sage Bot Item Code: A68


Other locations the gear can be found

Mystic Dragon
Dragon's Eye

Triggers: Once in a while

Resurrects up to 4 random units that got killed (both allies and enemies) with 50% health. They fight for the artifact wearer for 2 sec and then die. They are unable to use their artifact abilities.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚
